channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising fuel prices linked to Iran conflict add £2 billion burden on UK drivers and intensify debate over fuel duty policy
item.description: UK motorists are facing a significant rise in fuel costs linked to the ongoing conflict involving Iran, with analysis indicating that drivers will collectively have paid an additional £2 billion at th...

item.title: Police Investigate Fatal Shooting of Man Found in Car Trunk During San Marino Traffic Stop
item.description: San Marino police and the Los Angeles County Sheriff’s Department are investigating the death of a man found with multiple gunshot wounds in the trunk of a gray Ford sedan during an early-morning traf...

item.title: California Governor Candidates Debate Key Issues Ahead of Primary
item.description: In a lively debate at Pomona College, eight major candidates for California governor addressed key issues including high gas prices, housing costs, and homeowner insurance rates. Former Health and Hum...

item.title: A Peppercorn’s Adventure: From Healing the King to Winning the Princess
item.description: This charming folktale from Tamil Nadu narrates the whimsical adventure of a seventh black peppercorn that escapes a royal remedy and ends up performing extraordinary feats. The story begins with a ki...

item.title: King Charles and Trump exchange humour and diplomacy during White House state dinner
item.description: King Charles III and US President Donald Trump shared a mix of humour and diplomacy during a White House state dinner, where both leaders exchanged light-hearted remarks while also signalling the impo...

item.title: Landlords express concern over potential rent freeze amid cost of living pressures
item.description: Landlords in the UK have expressed strong opposition following comments by Chancellor Rachel Reeves suggesting a possible rent freeze to help ease the cost of living crisis. While Reeves did not confi...

item.title: Dodgers add versatile infielder-outfielder Tyler Fitzgerald in cash deal with Blue Jays
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers have acquired utility player Tyler Fitzgerald from the Toronto Blue Jays in exchange for cash considerations, continuing a series of roster adjustments involving the 28-year-ol...

item.title: US announces limited-edition passport for 250th independence anniversary
item.description: The United States dey plan to issue a special passport wey go carry President Donald Trump's face on the inside cover to mark the country's 250th independence anniversary. According to the State Depar...

item.title: Superdry co-founder denies rape allegation in Cheltenham court
item.description: James Holder, co-founder of the clothing company Superdry, is on trial at Gloucester Crown Court over allegations of rape and assault by penetration following a night out in Cheltenham on 6 May 2022. ...

item.title: Gbenga Daniel obtains APC nomination form despite Abiodun’s consensus endorsement in Ogun
item.description: Former Ogun State governor and current senator representing Ogun East, Otunba Gbenga Daniel, don pick nomination and expression of interest forms to contest again for Senate under APC, even though par...

item.title: ASX dips amid inflation pressures, oil price surge, and tech stock falls
item.description: The Australian sharemarket closed lower for the seventh consecutive session, with the S&P/ASX 200 falling 23.7 points to 8687. Inflation figures for March showed a 4.6% annual increase, close to a thr...

item.title: Kenya Civil Aviation Authority Seeks New Director General with Extensive Experience
item.description: The Kenya Civil Aviation Authority (KCAA) has officially opened applications for the position of Director General as the current DG's term comes to an end. This top leadership role requires candidates...

item.title: US-Iran peace negotiations stall amid nuclear dispute and regional tensions
item.description: Efforts to end the ongoing conflict between the US and Iran have hit a deadlock. The latest Iranian peace proposal suggests postponing discussions on the nuclear programme until after the war conclude...

item.title: UAE Exits OPEC: Implications for Global Oil Markets
item.description: The United Arab Emirates announced on Tuesday that it is leaving OPEC, a move that shakes the traditionally unified oil-exporting bloc led by Saudi Arabia. OPEC, established in 1960, coordinates oil p...

item.title: Labor seeks private investment and superannuation to fund $36 billion missile program
item.description: The Australian Labor government is planning a major expansion of the nation's missile stockpiles, aiming to raise billions through private investment and the country's $4.5 trillion superannuation sec...

item.title: UN reform must embrace fairness, diversity, and efficiency to stay relevant
item.description: The United Nations is at a crossroads, facing pressure to reform in order to remain effective and uphold human rights. Since its inception in 1945, the UN has been structured around the interests of t...

item.title: World Cup 2026 Group C Preview: Brazil and Morocco Favoured, Scotland Seek Breakthrough, Haiti Face Uphill Battle
item.description: Group C of the 2026 FIFA World Cup looks set to feature Brazil and Morocco as the leading contenders, with Scotland and Haiti viewed as underdogs. Brazil, with five World Cup titles, will field a stro...

item.title: Iran’s Trust in Pakistan as Mediator Has Diminished
item.description: Recent developments in Middle Eastern geopolitics have strained Iran's trust in Pakistan as a mediator in regional disputes. Traditionally, Pakistan has acted as a bridge between Iran and other countr...

item.title: Philippine and US Forces Conduct Air Defense Drills in Zambales
item.description: In Zambales, Philippine and American troops carried out a joint air defense exercise as part of Balikatan 2026, the largest edition of the annual military drills so far. The Integrated Air and Missile...

item.title: Former teacher and partner accused of abusing and causing the death of adopted baby
item.description: A court in Preston has heard allegations that Jamie Varley, 37, and his partner John McGowan-Fazakerley, 32, abused and caused the death of their adopted 13-month-old son, Preston Davey. The child, ta...
